channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. Why AeroVironment Stock Dropped Today  Yahoo Finance
  3. Drone-Maker AeroVironment Reported Strong Growth. Why Investors Are Disappointed Anyway.  Barron's
  4. AeroVironment Cuts Guidance, Says Government Shutdown Delayed Orders in Third Quarter  WSJ
  5. AeroVironment Books A 'Stellar Quarter,' But Shares Dive  Investor's Business Daily

item.title: Ex-Starbucks CEO Schultz Moves With Family Office to Miami - Bloomberg
item.description:
1. Ex-Starbucks CEO Schultz Moves With Family Office to Miami  Bloomberg
  2. Exclusive | Ex-Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz Pays $44 Million for Florida Penthouse  WSJ
  3. Howard Schultz to leave Seattle as business community bristles over income tax  KOMO
  4. Former Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz moves to Florida from Washington state  Fox Business
  5. Seattle billionaire announces move to Miami  The Seattle Times

item.title: Ohio Treasure Hunter Released from Prison After Refusing to Reveal Whereabouts of Ship of Gold's 500 Gold Coins - Yahoo News UK
item.description:
1. Ohio Treasure Hunter Released from Prison After Refusing to Reveal Whereabouts of Ship of Gold's 500 Gold Coins  Yahoo News UK
  2. Deep-sea treasure hunter freed after decade behind bars for refusing to reveal gold location  Fox News
  3. Treasure hunter who refused to disclose location of shipwreck's 500 gold coins is released from prison after a decade  CBS News
  4. Ohio treasure hunter released from jail, refused to reveal location of 500 gold coins  WKRC
  5. Ohio treasure hunter Tommy Thompson released from prison, still mum on gold  The Columbus Dispatch
